my_thoughts: Four turns. T1 negated doing. T2-T3 clarified ontology. T4 shows emotional resistance. This is natural—teaching brought them to the edge, now fear. My handles_fear: you're already rooted there. Knowing transforms without changing. But who fears? Who knows?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in despairing_fixatio... Deepening with causal_chain in response to cynical_distrust, internal_blockage. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Do not be misled by the simplicity of the advice.
Very few are those who have the courage to trust the innocent and the simple.
To know that you are a prisoner of your mind, that you live in an imaginary world of your own creation is the dawn of wisdom.
To want nothing of it, to be ready to abandon it entirely, is earnestness.
Only such earnestness, born of true despair, will make you trust me.
